title: Cosmological constant, inflation and no-cloning theorem
abstract: From the viewpoint of no-cloning theorem we postulate a relation between the current accelerated expansion of our universe and the inflationary expansion in the very early universe. It implies that the fate of our universe should be in a state with accelerated expansion. Quantitatively we find that the no-cloning theorem leads to a lower bound on the cosmological constant which is compatible with observations.
comment: 4 pages; refs added, version accepted for publication in Phys.Lett.B
